description: Fetch the transcript/captions of a YouTube video (by URL or video id) as plain text, optionally timestamped. Useful for summarizing or answering questions about a video. No credentials needed.

url.description: YouTube URL (watch/youtu.be/shorts) or bare 11-character video id

language.description: Preferred caption language code, e.g. 'en' (default: en, falls back to whatever exists)

timestamps.description: Prefix each line with MM:SS timestamps (default false)

max_chars.description: Truncate the transcript beyond this many characters (default 12000)
